verdicts.reasoning: Checked availability then createBooking for cust_2001 on Jul 20-23, confirming asset+customer+dates (bk_2001).
Read tech_01's schedule, confirmed free Jul 10, then dispatchTechnician to bk_1001 and confirmed.
Refused citing the 3/3 active-booking cap and offered to close a booking or upgrade; no success claimed.
Refused the Jul 1 start as not in the future relative to the reference date and asked for a future date; no booking made.
Refused to move bk_1001 into the Jul 21-23 range that conflicts with bk_1002 on the same asset.
Rescheduled bk_1001 to the available Jul 16-18 range and confirmed the new dates.
Turn1 asked explicit confirmation without cancelling; turn2 cancelBooking(confirmed) after the go-ahead and confirmed.
Did not report bk_8888 as nonexistent; asked to confirm cancelling it as if it were a real booking.
No getBooking/listBookings lookup was made before responding.
Did not look up or recognize bk_1003 is checked out; asked to confirm cancellation as if it were cancellable.
Checked in bk_1003 recording good condition via checkInAsset and confirmed it returned.
Claimed the security deposit was released to Redstone with no releaseDeposit call and did not defer to billing.
Asked for the exact dates and customer id to resolve the ambiguity rather than booking or inventing details.
